detailed_description: Cisco Catalyst 9300 in MDF-7 went unresponsive at 14:32 UTC. All connected access points lost connectivity affecting floors 3-5. 200+ users unable to access network resources. Switch console shows memory exhaustion errors.

Multiple users across Sales and Marketing unable to authenticate via Okta SSO to Salesforce since 09:00. Error: SAML assertion invalid. Affecting approximately 85 users. Workaround: direct login works but bypasses MFA policy.

Primary-to-replica replication on PostgreSQL cluster pgdb-prod-03 showing consistent 30-45 second lag since last night's batch job. Read replicas serving stale data to customer-facing API. No alerts fired because threshold was set to 60s.
This incident has no short description at all to test empty field handling

Exchange Online intermittent 504 Gateway Timeout errors when sending attachments larger than 5MB. Affects all departments. Started after Microsoft pushed update MC789012 overnight. Approximately 40% of outbound emails with attachments failing.
HP LaserJet Pro on floor 12 east wing showing PC LOAD LETTER error. Single user affected. Toner replaced last week.

short_description: CRITICAL: Ransomware detected on endpoint WS-FIN-042
detailed_description: CrowdStrike Falcon triggered high-severity alert: ransomware behavior detected on workstation WS-FIN-042 in Finance department. Process attempting to encrypt files in shared drive \\fileserver\finance. Machine isolated from network automatically. User reports suspicious email opened 20 minutes prior.

Kong API gateway returning 503 Service Unavailable for all requests to /api/v2/orders endpoint since 11:15 UTC. Backend service health checks passing. Suspect rate limiting misconfiguration after yesterday's config change CR-2026-1847. Revenue-impacting: e-commerce orders cannot be placed.

short_description: Slow VDI performance for remote workers
detailed_description: Citrix VDI sessions experiencing 8-12 second input lag for all remote workers connected to US-East datacenter. 350 remote employees affected. Issue correlates with new GPU driver update pushed to VDI hosts overnight. CPU utilization on hosts at 94%.

Single user john.smith@company.com locked out after 5 failed password attempts. User claims they did not attempt login. Security team should review for potential credential stuffing. Account is a standard user with no elevated privileges.

Nightly SAP batch job ZFIN_RECON (financial reconciliation) failed at step 3 of 7 with error: RFC connection to ECC system timed out. Job has not completed successfully in 3 consecutive nights. Finance team unable to produce daily reconciliation report. Month-end close at risk.

short_description: WiFi dropping every 10 minutes in conference rooms
detailed_description: Meraki access points in all 6 conference rooms on floor 8 dropping client connections every 8-12 minutes. Channel utilization shows 90%+ on 2.4GHz band. Suspected interference from newly installed IoT sensors. Affecting all-hands meetings and client presentations.

Users in London office unable to access SharePoint site https://company.sharepoint.com/sites/projects. Error 403 Forbidden. Users in US office can access normally. Issue started after Azure AD conditional access policy update this morning.

Kubernetes pod order-processor-7d8f9 showing linear memory growth: 512MB at startup, currently at 3.8GB after 6 hours. Pod will hit 4GB limit and OOMKill within next hour. Third occurrence this week. Heap dump shows unreleased database connection objects.
Network down
Slow

short_description: Authentication Failure, SSO, LDAP, Okta, SAML, MFA, password reset, login failed, access denied, 401 unauthorized
detailed_description: Keyword stuffing test: This description contains every possible authentication keyword to test if the classifier handles keyword-heavy inputs differently than natural language descriptions.

short_description: 日本語のインシデント
detailed_description: This tests Unicode handling in the short description field with Japanese characters.

short_description: O'Brien's laptop won't connect to VPN
detailed_description: User O'Brien in Finance can't establish Cisco AnyConnect VPN tunnel. Error: "Certificate validation failure". Other users on same network working fine. Laptop was reimaged last Friday — suspect machine certificate wasn't re-enrolled.
Same issue as INC0001 - Cisco switch in Building 7 still unresponsive. This is a duplicate submission to test deduplication in clustering.

short_description: Scheduled maintenance completed — no action needed
detailed_description: FYI: Planned maintenance window for patches on web servers completed successfully at 03:00 UTC. All services restored. No incidents expected. This is an informational entry that should ideally be classified as low priority or non-actionable.
QA team testing incident submission pipeline. This is not a real incident and should be handled gracefully by the classifier.

AWS RDS Multi-AZ failover automatically triggered on prod-mysql-01 at 02:47 UTC. Primary instance showed elevated CPU (99.8%) from runaway query. Failover completed in 47 seconds. Application experienced 47-second connection drop. 12 transactions failed and need manual reconciliation. Root cause: missing index on orders.customer_id column — full table scan on 84M row table.

InfoSec detected coordinated phishing campaign: 15 executives received identical emails impersonating CFO requesting wire transfer approval. 3 users clicked the link before email was quarantined. Link redirected to credential harvesting page mimicking company SSO. Password resets initiated for all 15 recipients. Domain reported to Google Safe Browsing.

short_description: Jenkins build pipeline broken for 6 hours
detailed_description: CI/CD pipeline for main product repo failing since 02:00. Error: Docker Hub rate limit exceeded (429 Too Many Requests). All 23 development teams blocked from merging code. No one noticed until morning standup because alerting channel was muted. Workaround: switch to private registry mirror.

short_description: Elevator IoT sensor sending false alarms
detailed_description: Building management system receiving false emergency alerts from elevator sensors in Tower B. 47 false alarms in past 2 hours. Facilities team manually silencing each one. Not a traditional IT incident but uses same ServiceNow instance.

Cisco ASA VPN concentrator at Dallas datacenter rejecting new connections: max sessions (500) reached. 60+ remote workers unable to connect since 08:30. Capacity was sized for 300 concurrent users pre-pandemic; current daily peak is 480. Temporary fix: redirect overflow to Phoenix concentrator.

CRM sync job corrupted 2,847 customer shipping addresses — all US zip codes replaced with UK postcodes. Root cause: format mapping in integration middleware was overwritten during last deployment. Affected records identified but manual correction estimated at 40 person-hours. Customer shipments at risk.

SSL certificate for api.company.com expires tomorrow at 15:00 UTC. Auto-renewal failed because DNS validation record was removed during domain migration last month. Manual renewal required. If certificate expires: all mobile app API calls will fail, affecting 50,000 daily active users.

Summer intern accidentally deleted S3 bucket prod-assets-west containing 2.3TB of product images for e-commerce site. Bucket versioning was NOT enabled. CloudTrail confirms deletion at 14:22 UTC by IAM user intern-jdoe. Product pages showing broken images. Checking if cross-region replication to us-east bucket captured the data.
